description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a combination of black and white upholstery. The seat and backrest surfaces are predominantly black, while the base, sides, and chaise section are white, creating a bold visual contrast. The sofa has a low-profile backrest that runs the full length of the main seating area and the chaise, with straight, clean lines and no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The armrest is present only on one side, matching the height of the backrest and extending in a straight, blocky profile. The legs are not distinctly visible, suggesting a block base or recessed support, giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic appearance. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as public lounges, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa with black and white upholstery, featuring a low backrest, single armrest, and a blocky, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full L-shape, black seat and backrest, white base, and the single armrest on the left.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end highlights the extended white chaise and the continuous backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the long, uninterrupted white back panel and the sofa's solid, blocky base.
description_view_3: Side view from the main seat end shows the armrest, black seat, and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single continuous seat cushion and backrest cushion, both attached and uniform in size, forming an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Single straight armrest on the left side, matching the height of the backrest, with a blocky, rectangular profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not distinctly visible; the sofa appears to have a solid block base or recessed supports, giving it a grounded, monolithic look.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest running the length of the main seat and chaise, with no segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid colored with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
